S.PHON: mwaɖiŋaɖiŋai nomi makanaəɭə. ai ʔatwanawŋa ta.
mwaɖiŋaɖiŋai nomi makanaəɭə. ai ʔatwanawŋa ta.

S.FORM: mwadringadringai nomi makanaelre. kai vaiyana ai 'athingale ko nomiya kai akanea ikakwata mawriva ka sin Taromaka.
S.PHON: mwaɖiŋaɖiŋai nomi makanaəɭə. kai vaijana ai ʔaθiŋalə ko nomija kai akanəa ikakwata mawriva ka sin taromaka.
S.FORM: mwadringadringai nomi makanaelre. kai vaiyana ai 'athingale ko nomiya kai akanea ikakwata mawriva ka sin Taromaka.
S.PHON: mwaɖiŋaɖiŋai nomi makanaəɭə. kai vaijana ai ʔaθiŋalə ko nomija kai akanəa ikakwata mawriva ka sin taromaka.
S.TRANSL: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的魯凱語怎麼說。
Hello everyone. Today, I am going to teach you how to say the Tarumake language for food.
Do you understand what the teacher says?

S.FORM: sinsi, nako wathingale. kalalekete so angi'elra mawriva?
S.PHON: sinsi, nako waθiŋalə. kalaləkətə so aŋiʔəɭa mawriva?
S.FORM: sinsi, nako wathingale. kalalekete so angi'elra mawriva?
S.PHON: sinsi, nako waθiŋalə. kalaləkətə so aŋiʔəɭa mawriva?
S.TRANSL: 老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
I don't understand. Can you repeat it again?
我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
I can't hear you, can you speak louder?

S.FORM: la ccela kikai! ta angi'elana wasi'i.
S.PHON: la ʦʦəla kikai! ta aŋiʔəlana wasiʔi.
S.FORM: la ccela kikai! ta angi'elana wasi'i.
S.PHON: la ʦʦəla kikai! ta aŋiʔəlana wasiʔi.
S.TRANSL: 請看這裡!跟著我唸一遍。
Look here, please! Repeat after me.
Read it again. Please speak louder.

S.PHON: maɭa otalivaivaj na ʔaʦasə na hooŋo
maɭa otalivaivaj na ʔaʦasə na hooŋo
sinsi, marimora ko iloko sa ʔinpiʦi.
sinsi, marimora ko iloko sa ʔinpiʦi.
S.TRANSL: I forgot to bring my pen.
I forgot to bring my eraser.

S.FORM: kisalrowa ki tabere so kwadra yakai ki thili so.

Class dismissed, see you next week.

Is it going to be cold outside?
It's cold, so wear more clothes.

It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

S.FORM: eea kai soko li, ta tadrosa si soko!
S.PHON: əəa kai soko li, ta taɖosa si soko!
S.FORM: eea kai soko li, ta tadrosa si soko!
S.PHON: əəa kai soko li, ta taɖosa si soko!
S.TRANSL: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

S.FORM: kaivai ka akisalro so nakowa 'aswlala ka 'acase, naw swali mosowa,

S.FORM: aikatoma, lo ikainga kai 'aiso so sawlriyanga nakowa

S.TRANSL: 沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。

I'll return it to you tomorrow.

kaivai ʔinpiʦi akisaɭo moswa ko təʔa?

kaivai ʔinpiʦi akisaɭo mosowa ko təʔa?

sawɭija mijaŋa ki ləgəʔa iɖa ʔaisoli.

S.FORM: ya! ani kakalra kai ki borasi so.
S.PHON: ja! ani kakaɭa kai ki borasi so.
